summary: Completed testing of Trash/Recycle Bin feature. All 8 backend API tests passed (1 skipped - no teacher account). Frontend UI verified: trash page at /trash shows items correctly with restore and permanent delete buttons, clear all button, 30-day retention note, and sidebar menu has 'سلة المحذوفات' link for admin users.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 passed, 1 skipped - no teacher account for access control test)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test students during trash flow tests: TEST_UI_002, TEST_PERM_DEL_UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trash management feature fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/trash (list), POST /api/trash/{id}/restore, DELETE /api/trash/{id} (permanent), DELETE /api/trash (clear all). Safe-delete for students/teachers/courses automatically adds to trash collection. Frontend trash page at /trash shows items sorted by deletion date with restore/permanent delete buttons, clear all when items exist, empty state when no items. Sidebar menu includes 'سلة المحذوفات' link for admin role only. Items auto-expire after 30 days.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/trash - List all trash items with id, item_type, item_name, deleted_at, expires_at, days_remaining ✅
POST /api/trash/{id}/restore - Restore item and remove from trash ✅
DELETE /api/trash/{id} - Permanently delete single item from trash ✅
Error handling for non-existent trash items (404) ✅
frontend_elements: Item count 'X عنصر في السلة' shown ✅
Clear all button 'تفريغ الكل' visible when items exist ✅
Empty state 'سلة المحذوفات فارغة' when no items ✅
Item cards with type badge, name, days remaining, deleted info ✅
Permanent delete button 'حذف نهائي' on each item ✅
Sidebar menu has 'سلة المحذوفات' link for admin ✅
